/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/BKav_Chat.dir/BKav_Chat_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BKav_Chat.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BKav_Chat.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BKav_Chat.dir/login.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BKav_Chat.dir/signup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BKav_Chat.dir/errorlogin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BKav_Chat.dir/errorsignup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BKav_Chat.dir/errorconnectionnetwork.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/BKav_Chat.dir/build/Desktop_Qt_6_11_1-Debug/.qt/rcc/qrc_BKav_Chat_translations.cpp.o" -o BKav_Chat  -Wl,-rpath,/home/chau-dinh/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib: /home/chau-dinh/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /home/chau-dinh/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /home/chau-dinh/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1 -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/chau-dinh/Qt/6.11.1/gcc_64/lib
